paper_section: §3 Results, abstract claim of universality (Round 2 update)
paper_quote: EML + 1 generates all standard scientific calculator operations.
informal_pl: Aktualizacja parasolowego twierdzenia chunku 045 do 29 spójników, łącznie ze wszystkimi 21 nowymi pod-świadkami rundy 2.
informal_en: Updates the umbrella theorem of chunk 045 to 29 conjuncts, including all 21 new sub-witnesses from Round 2.
lean_target_signature: theorem main_completeness_full : <29-conjunct existential covering chunks 022/030–042/050–067> := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; supersedes chunk 045 with the 29-conjunct umbrella. Dependency on chunks 034/035/039 (π, i, √x) is intentionally avoided in this stub — those remain permanent sorries — but the trig/inverse-trig witnesses transitively depend on them, so this chunk also remains a permanent stub for now.
